scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev:install: pnpm install && cd artifacts/streamlit-app && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "BASE_PATH=/ PORT=5173 pnpm --filter @workspace/statyx-ai run dev" "cd artifacts/streamlit-app && python -m streamlit run app.py --server.port=8501 --server.headless=true --server.enableCORS=false --server.enableXsrfProtection=false" "cd artifacts/streamlit-app && python api.py"
